# pip-audit ignore list (nousergon/alpha-engine-config#2342)
# Every entry below MUST carry a dated rationale comment directly above it.
# No blanket suppression — each accepted advisory is named individually.
# Format:
#   # <rationale> — accepted 2026-07-12, revisit <YYYY-MM-DD or "when a fix is released">
#   <VULN-ID>
#
# No entries as of 2026-07-12: a full `pip-audit` run against the CI
# environment (Python 3.11, `pip install -r requirements.txt`) came back
# clean after bumping pyarrow 14.0.2 -> 23.0.1 (fixes PYSEC-2024-161 and
# PYSEC-2026-113; verified via `pytest tests/ -v`, all 1496 tests pass).
# pip/setuptools/urllib3/requests findings observed during local
# investigation were artifacts of testing under Python 3.9 (unavailable
# python3.11 in the sandbox at first) — botocore's urllib3 upper bound
# only applies to python_version < "3.10", so those never affected the
# real CI environment. Re-verified clean end-to-end on Python 3.11.
